diary_entries.entry: The dust_storm changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.
Year 71 on Mars. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 162 food units left.
Population: 30. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. I spent the year on sabotage. Closest to Selene-1.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 71): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
